tagline: A Private Club. For Members Only.

hero.headline: Where Gentlemen Belong
hero.subheadline: Salt Lake City's most exclusive members-only club. Limited to 300 members who enjoy unlimited barber services, massages, shoe shines, and a private lounge surrounded by authentic Western antiques.
checkmarks: Unlimited monthly visits for all services

services.headline: The Full Member Experience
services.subtitle: Every service included with your membership. No add-on fees. No limits.

cards.title: Premium Barber Services
cards.description: Haircuts, steam towels, and straight razor shaves from top-tier barbers in an authentic 1930s-1940s atmosphere.

cards.title: Chair Massage
cards.description: Rejuvenating massages from skilled therapists. Walk in anytime during club hours for unlimited monthly sessions.

cards.title: Professional Shoe Shines
cards.description: Keep your shoes looking impeccable with our on-site shine service, available every visit at no extra charge.

cards.title: Private Lounge Access
cards.description: Leather Chesterfield sofas, vinyl music, Western antiques, and premium beverages in an exclusive gathering space.

cards.title: Conference Room
cards.description: A private business meeting room for members. Host clients, close deals, or work remotely in distinguished surroundings.

cards.title: Skin Care & Grooming
cards.description: Professional skin care treatments and haberdasher consultations to keep the modern gentleman looking refined.

steps.title: Get Referred
steps.description: Membership grows exclusively through word-of-mouth. Receive a referral from a current member or inquire directly.

steps.title: Secure Your Slot
steps.description: With only 300 slots available, we review each application to maintain our exclusive community standards.

steps.title: Enjoy Unlimited Access
steps.description: Once approved, visit as often as you like. All services — barber, massage, shoe shine, lounge — are included.

about.label: About Mac's Place
about.headline: Salt Lake City's Best-Kept Secret Since 2019
about.description: Mac's Place is an exclusive members-only city club offering a refined gathering place where gentlemen enjoy beverages, socialize, receive haircuts and shaves, and listen to vinyl music. Every corner is sprawling with Western antiques: vintage Harley-Davidson signs, leather Chesterfield sofas, and a cowboy bar built in 1901. Founded in 2019, membership has grown entirely through word-of-mouth — no marketing, no advertising. Just an experience worth talking about.

features.title: Word-of-Mouth Only
features.description: Membership has grown entirely through personal referrals since 2019. No marketing, no advertising — just an experience worth sharing.

features.title: Authentic Western Antiques
features.description: Every corner features genuine 1930s-1940s pieces: vintage Harley signs, leather Chesterfields, and a cowboy bar built in 1901.

features.title: Hand-Picked Staff
features.description: The owner personally recruits every barber, massage therapist, and team member to ensure only top-tier talent serves our members.

pricing.headline: One Membership. Everything Included.
pricing.subtitle: No per-visit fees. No service add-ons. Unlimited access to every amenity, every month.

guarantee.headline: The Mac's Place Promise
guarantee.description: We built this club for gentlemen who demand the best. If at any point your membership experience does not exceed your expectations, speak directly with our team. We personally ensure every member feels the value from day one.

faqs.question: How do I become a member?
faqs.answer: Membership is primarily through word-of-mouth referrals from existing members. You may also inquire directly — we review each application to ensure the right fit for our community.

faqs.question: What is included with membership?
faqs.answer: Everything. Unlimited haircuts, straight razor shaves, steam towels, massages, shoe shines, skin care, lounge access, conference room use, and beverages are all included in your monthly membership.

faqs.question: How often can I visit?
faqs.answer: As often as you like. There are no limits on monthly visits. Many members come weekly for barber services and drop by the lounge even more frequently.

faqs.question: Are there really only 300 membership slots?
faqs.answer: Yes. We intentionally cap membership at 300 to maintain our exclusive atmosphere and ensure every member receives personalized, unhurried service.

faqs.question: Can I bring a guest?
faqs.answer: Members may bring guests on select occasions. This is a private club, so guest policies are designed to preserve the exclusive experience for all members.

testimonials.name: Verified Member
testimonials.text: Mac's Place provides something that Salt Lake has been missing but needed for years - a private club that caters to those who desire the best of the best. The owner seeks out and hires the top barbers, massage therapists, and staff.

testimonials.name: Club Member
testimonials.text: The attention to detail in service and decor, coupled with the warm hospitality from the staff, makes Mac's Place a hidden gem in the city. More than just a barbershop, it is a community hub that celebrates quality, comfort, and camaraderie.

testimonials.name: Loyal Member
testimonials.text: You can get a haircut, steam towel, straight razor shave, massage and a shoe shine all in one visit. As a member, you can go as many times a month as you want and all the services are included. The atmosphere is unmatched.

contact.headline: Inquire About Membership
contact.subtitle: Slots are limited. Reach out to learn how to join Salt Lake City's most exclusive private club.
benefits: Learn about current availability and referral process

footer.description: Mac's Place is Salt Lake City's premier members-only private club, offering unlimited grooming services, a refined lounge, and an exclusive community since 2019.
